headline: MSCI’s New Private Markets Report Adds Context To Valuation Debate
summary: MSCI (NYSE:MSCI) has released its inaugural State of Private Markets 2026 report. The report focuses on transparency demands, structural stresses, and changing private market dynamics. Key themes include stressed private credit conditions, shifts in investor bases, and evolving liquidity and redemption practices. MSCI, with its stock recently trading at around $588.55, is widely followed for its indexes and analytics and is increasingly active in private markets. Over the past 5 years, the...

headline: AI Rally Drives Best Run in Global Momentum Stocks on Record
